deliveries.commentary: Back of length just outside off, 131ks, guided to short third
Wide and shortish, no swing, cut to deep point
Flat-batted for a... six? Yep, just cleared the cushion. Hard length outside off, Samson took a step back and stood in the crease, then had the flat-bat take over
A bit of shape away. Length ball just outside off, defended to cover point
Nearly an edge. Looks to drive through cover, the length ball shapes in a touch to beat bat
Length on off, worked to the bowler
Length on off, defended towards cover
Length outside off, guided to point
Length outside off, punched to deep cover. Abhishek doesn't attack the first ball he faces
Pulls the shortish ball from just outside off to midwicket
Samson decided he'll go big before the ball was bowled. Showed the stumps fully, got back in the crease and belted the shortish ball over long-on. Banged in but it rose only around hip-height though
Back of length wide of off, this swings away and gets some extra bounce to beat the cut
Slower length ball outside off, cut on the bounce to backward point
Length just outside off, gentle cut to cover
Back of length just outside off, slow again, Samson stays beside the ball as he jumps and punches it with a horizontal bat through extra cover
Appeal for a strangle down leg from the keeper, sounded like pad. Outswinger - didn't swing - on a length down leg, beat the flick and went off the thigh pad
Length outside off, guided to deep-backward point
Overpitched and Abhishek goes inside out, no-ball too! Foot fully over the line. This was just outside off, step-hit for Abhishek. Lofted it and checked the shot after bat reached head-height
Misses the slog. Wanted to heave it over mid-on off a length, the ball looked to have come in. Axar did roll his fingers on
Goes for the wide yorker, lands it just inside the return crease. Let go. Free hit will continue as it's wide
Short ball went well down leg, ducked under
Length on the pads, there's protection. Glanced to long leg
Short ball follows Marumani as he tries to make room. He then tries to fend it to cover, inside edges onto body
Was there a sound? Not much interest from bowler or keeper. Was a shortish ball slanting away outside off, Abhishek looked for a flashing cut and missed it
Makes room and looks to slog the full ball across the line, inside edges it to square leg
Back of length, slow, on leg. Flicked through midwicket
Length just outside off, pushed to deep point's right

Samsn's start reduced to a cameo. Muzarabani pumps his fists. Offcutter on a length at the hips, following Samson as he made room, seemed like he wanted to drive it more than pull it, ball hit just under the sticker and carried to deep midwicket, where Burl took a sliding catch to the right
Compact pull from Kishan, not timed well enough though. Goes over the ring at square leg and gets two
Hard length on leg, 135ks, flicked to midwicket
Wide and full, 132ks, gets on one knee and slaps to deep point

Picked up nicely, flat one-bounce four over backward square leg. No back lift, just a short-arm flick to a length ball angling in. Both feet bent and close to each other, the front leg got up just a bit as he hit it
Launched over cow corner, Abhishek goes back and effectively drives a length ball with a closing bat face. Whacked the slower one off the top of the pad
Wide and slow, beats him. Bennett looks to slash the fullish ball over cover, misses
Lapped over short fine leg. Ngarava misses the yorker, delivers a full toss just over the front knee-roll at 134ks, Kishan uses the angle to get on one knee and then hit it
Pitched up on off, defended to backward point

Goes high, crowd aren't sure whether to cheer or not, and that's because it hasn't travelled. Lands safely though, fielder has to run back to deep square leg. Wasn't that short a ball but Kishan went through with the pull
Slower one, still Kishan uses the pace. Uses the bounce to go back on the short of length ball and then pull from chest height to the right of short fine leg
Full on leg, flicked to deep midwicket
Flicks the length ball off the back foot to midwicket
Angles it in from around the wicket and then spins it off a length. Landed outside off and Kishan looks to push it to cover. Misses
Length outside off, driven off the back foot to cover
Full on middle, driven to long-off
Carved straight to cover point. Back of length just outside off, Marumani opted for the cut but didn't go through with the shot. Lobbed it to Kishan
Length at the stumps, defended to the bowler's right
Goes outside off to negate the lbw. Length ball hits the front pad after beating the sweep
Bennett almost gets a first-ball wicket. Touch short, angling in, Abhishek cloths a pull and it lands just past the ring and then rolls to long-off
Length on off, defensive punch takes it to long-on
Pulls it off the top of the stumps to deep midwicket
Pitched up at the stumps, gets beside the ball and punches to the bowler
Gets leg side and cuts it off the top of leg to deep cover
Good pull, goes to deep-backward square. Length ball going dow leg, Kishan swivelling and taking a big step to the left

'Catch' is the call but it lands safe and goes to deep midwicket's right. Kishan charged and was beaten in flight by the shortish length ball angling in. He lost his bottom hand as he swiped across his waist, ball went flat
Dances down and is hurried by the 94ks length ball, clipped through backward square leg
Length on middle, pulled to long-on
Dances down again and clears long-on! Brave call from Bennett to go down as Axar shortens his length but an on-the-up drive is nailed
Chips a drive over the bowler to a full ball... and Evans charges to the left at long-off and then throws himself forward while palming the ball back in. Brilliant
Makes room, gets followed by a full ball which he pushes towards mid-off

Musekiwa drops a regulation catch! Kishan shaped up for the reverse sweep before the ball was bowled. Got a low full toss to the left but went through with the shot. Ball went low and in front of Musekiwa, who leant forward to take it but the ball burst through the hand
Back of length on off, worked to deep square leg
Salt-on-wound six. Dances down and pumps the fullish length ball through the line, over long-on
Makes room, gets a length ball on leg stump, cuts to deep point
Comes down and chips a drive to long-on
Dances down and works it through mid-on
Superb fifty from Abhishek. What a welcome return to form for him. Gets there off 26 balls. Slower through the air and stifle short outside off, he pulls to deep midwicket
Fuller on off stump, he looks to loft this straight, instead drags to long-on for a run
Too full and punished. Darted just around off, gets under it and absolutely shellacks it past Abhishek. Nothing long-on could do even with a dive
Fired in on off stump on a length, Bennett can only shank that as far as long-on

High and handsome. Don't think he got all of it, but such is Kishan's power and bat swing that he clears long-off with ease. Slower through the air on the stumps, he jumps down the track and swings through the line down the ground. The bat turns in his hand a little, but he still gets six
A touch slower on middle stump, he backs away and chips it over the bowler's head
On a length on off stump, he presents the full face of the bat and pushes to long-on
Carrom ball on leg stump, Raza is cramped for room and defends back to the bowler
Swing and a miss! Short of a good length ball outside off, he wants to go over mid-off, but loses his shape and gets beaten
Marginally short and Raza cashes in. Hops back and deposits this miles over deep midwicket
Back of a length ball just outside off, Abhishek is cramped up for room and just about pats that to the right of backward point for a single
Quicker length ball on the stumps, he ticks this to wide long-on for a run
Lovely flick of the wrists from Surya. Good length ball on middle stump, he stands tall and whisks this to the right of midwicket for a couple of runs
Back of a length ball on middle stump, he backs away, makes room for himself and carves it over short third for a four. That is a top shot
Back of a length ball outside off, giving Raza some room. He cuts this to backward point, who collects on the bounce
GOING, GOING, GONE! Maposa goes fuller on middle and leg, Surya makes room again, jumps down the track and with a clean extension of the arms goes miles over the long-off fence

Oh, my word! What a shot from Bennett! Backs away, giving himself room and Bumrah follows him with a bouncer. Bennett still manages to connect and with a clean swing of the bat almost flat-bats this over long-on. He gets to fifty off just 34 balls
Slower offcutter outside off stump, he gets right across this time eyeing his favourite sweep over short fine. Doesn't connect with the ball clipping his thigh pad towards short fine
Goes full now right on off stump, Bennett digs this to covers
Slower ball picked up and thrashed with disdain. Fullish outside off stump, he clears his front leg and absolutely thrashes him straight down the ground. Nothing long-off could do about it.
Fuller just on off, he guides this to short third
Flatter on off stump, he gives himself room trying to whack that through covers but can only mistime to cover
In Hardik's arc, the ball goes out of the park! An 89m six for him. On off stump, Hardik gets under it and pummels this over long-on for a huge six
Fuller on off stump, he thumps this back to Axar. Raza has to dive back to make his ground
Pushed quicker and fuller outside off, he mistimes to extra cover who makes a diving stop
Darted outside off, he backs away and carves it over point and to sweeper cover
Back of a length ball outside off, he slaps that to the right of sweeper cover for a couple of runs
Starts off with a juicy short and wide ball outside off, Bennett stands tall and crunches this aerially to the right of sweeper cover. Some nifty footwork from Arshdeep saves two
Back of a length ball angling across Pandya, he steers this fine to deep third
BANG! Bennett has six more! Banged halfway down the track but at his pace, Bennett just waits for the ball and thumps the pull over cow corner
He's SWATTED that away with utter disdain! Back of a length ball just outside off stump, he initially backs away and then sets a solid base, with an open stance and pummels that over deep midwicket.
Six followed by four! Fuller on the stumps, he clears his front leg and thrashes this past the bowler's extended right hand for four
Good length ball on off stump, he guides this to backward point with an angled bat. A wayward throw and they get an overthrow.
Marginally short and Raza this time goes for six. On middle and leg, he hammers that miles over deep midwicket
hard length delivery on the stumps, he gives himself room and pushes towards deep cover
Flatter outside off, he slashes at it and gets it to sweeper cover on the bounce
Out comes the scoop and Tilak gets four more. Short of a good length ball, he gets across and scoops this over the 'keeper's head
BIG swing and a miss! Darted on leg stump, Bennett eyes a cross-batted swipe and misses. They collect a bye as Samson fumbles
Slower short of a good length ball on middle and leg, he works this deep backward square leg
Full on pace ball but that is just down leg, called a wide
Angles the good length ball across Raza who eyes a pull and inside-edges onto his boot

Fortunate but Hardik won't mind. The four runs are all that will matter to him. Legcutter on leg stump, he was looking to work this through the on-side, instead he gets a thick inside-edge through his legs past short fine leg

Swallowed by Abhishek at long-on. Arshdeep's knuckle ball brings about Raza's end. Angles it short of a good length around off stump. Raza looks to clear long-on, doesn't time it at all and Abhishek does the rest
Full on middle and leg, he clips this to deep midwicket and again some superb running allows them to make it back for two
Banged in short on off stump, Burl sways outside the line of that.
Slower ball picked up and sent out of the ground! Short of a good length ball on off stump, he stays deep in the crease and tonks it flat and over deep midwicket
Yorker on off stump, he gets a thick inside-edge to the on-side
Short of a good length ball on off stump, he thrashes this flat and this time doesn't get enough elevation. Goes one bounce to long-on
Nails the yorker again on off stump, Munyonga just manages to dig that out to deep point
The attempted yorker goes wrong. Knee-high full toss outside off, easy pickings for Tilak as he carves this over backward point

Chipped over Bumrah and goes for four as Bennett enters the 80s! Goes fuller outside off, he gets across looking for a scoop, but realises that he can't go over the 'keeper so he goes reverse with the scoop over Bumrah's head at short third
Banged in short on off stump, he pulls to wide long-on
Slower good length ball but waaaay outside off stump, called a wide
backs away and Arshdeep follows him, which means that Bennett can just about squeeze this to point
The fifty stand is up off just 22 balls! Banged in short just outside off, he pulls this hard and in the gap to the left of deep midwicket
TIMBER! Absolutely nails the yorker on middle stump. Munyonga backs away, but is nowhere near as he looks to swish it away. Misses and sees his stumps in a mess
Low full toss outside off stump, he toe-ends this to long-off
Another solid yorker right on off stump, Musekiwa jams that pretty neatly down to deep third
Pulls off the bottom-half of the batt through midwicket. Deep square leg cleans up

Mistimed... and gets away with it. Samson going far back in the crease again and gets a length ball at the stumps, looks to pull it hard. Ball hit just below the sticker and beat midwicket, running back. Chancy
Swipe and a miss. Bennett looks to go over square leg as the scramble-seam length ball comes back in and goes over off stump
Change-up - slow yorker may have swung in a bit. Samson looks to crunch a straight drive and gets an inside edge to fine leg
Yorker on middle, swings in and is defended to point
Swings in big off a back of length, beats the flick and hits high on the pad. Rolls behind point
Another wide, another free hit. Very low full toss, Abhishek didn't take a stride across and reached out to try and drive through cover. Misses. Samson thought of a run, sent back
Half-volleys the fielder at cover point. Wide and fullish, Marumani reached out and got on one knee to drive it with a horizontal bat
This free hit, he connects with. Yorker missed, Abhishek gets under the full ball and drives through the line for a straight four
Beats the pull. Back of length ball skids through and goes over middle stump. Not much footwork from Marumani, didn't go back
On the bounce to deep-backward square. Touch back of length on leg, Abhishek looking to help it along with the pull, didn't get it fine enough
Pitched up at the stumps, punched to the right of mid-on
Nice short-arm pull finds midwicket. Made room and the Hardik tried to follow him with a back-of-length ball. It finished over leg stump
Length on off, defended to the bowler

Mid-off has a chance, does he? No. Dube runs back but it clears him easily. Bennett cleared his front leg and looked to drive the fullish ball. Wanted to go over mid-on, then straightened his bat as the ball was beside him, got it off the bottom of the bat
Length just outside off, steered to deep point
Fullish ball on leg is helped along with a flick to deep fine leg
A bit of width on the 133ks length ball, cut hard to point. May have stuck in the pitch a touch
Yorker on leg, flicked to midwicket
Gets across well outside off, opens his stance and Evans sees him. Goes very wide and fullish, tries to slash over point, misses
Lot of flat-bat hits in the first dig, first one this innings. Belted back over the bowler. Slower length ball but there is room, Bennett whacks it from knee-height
Nearly a French cut onto the stumps. Went past off stump. Was a length ball wide of off, Abhishek took a step across and looked to pull it across to the leg side
Looks to go over midwicket and misses. Abhishek got outside off and looked to slog the length ball, slanting away from him
Samson played a couple of these to start, now it's Abhishek. Goes back a step and flat-bats a hard length ball right on the straight boundary board. Drinks
Skids through and that's pulled off the stumps. Deep midwicket runs to the left, dives across and stops it. Drinks
Length angling in towards off, makes room and slaps to deep cover does Abhishek
Length on leg, worked to midwicket
Length on leg, flicked to deep midwicket
Too full. On leg stump, 89ks, flicked to square leg
Full ball goes down leg after beating the leg glance
Bouncer over leg, ducked under. Sharp ball, good direction and speed off the pitch.
Length at the stumps, driven to long-off
Another bouncer, this is just outside off, pulled across to deep midwicket's left
Length on leg, gets the front leg to his right and flicks to midwicket

Bumrah and Samson appeal, umpire unmoved. SKY discusses and takes the review. Under-edge close to the ball, doesn't seem to have hit it. Ultra-Edge confirms it. Short ball, looked slow, just outside off. Bennett looked to slap it across to the leg side
Length wide of off, cut through point. Fifty stand up
Flat and wide outside off, cut to deep cover
Dances down and punches it on the rise to long-off
Looks to drive to long-off, gets an inside edge onto pad
Length outside off, looks to carve it off side, chops it off the underedge behind
Length on off, chopped to deep-backward point.
Worked to cover, looks for the single but it's not on
Short on middle, punched off the back foot to the bowler's left
GOT'EM! 4, 6, W and Raza is thrilled. Short and wide, was darted in by Raza. He slashes at it, gets it off a thickish outside edge straight to Muzarabani at short third
Ah, completely mistimes this. Was stifle short on off stump, he hops back eyeing a pull but mistimes it to wide long-on
And he's off the mark with a boundary. Fuller outside off, out comes the hard sweep and despite there being a deep backward square leg around, he manages to get it wider of him to his right
How's that missed leg stump? Oh, it's missed by a whisker! Flatter and fuller that lands on middle and leg. Raza backs away looking to thump that over long-on and misses
Fuller on the stumps, he eases to long-on
Just falls short of long-on. Pushed quicker on off and middle, he flat-bats it and doesn't get any elevation. Abhishek at long-on can't reach it in time
Excellent stop at backward point. Marginally short outside off, he cuts this to the left of the fielder who dives and saves three

DROPPED by Muzarabani at deep backward square leg. Oh, dear! Zimbabwe are being sloppy again in the field. Full on leg stump, he gets across and plays his favourite pick-up shot, but this time straight to the fielder. Muzarabani, I think loses the ball in the lights, moves forward late and ends up barely getting his fingertips to it. The ball goes for a four as well.
Fullish on off stump, eases to long-off for a single
Length ball on middle and leg, he pushes this towards mid-on
Bennett backs away but Varun follows him, cramping him for room. Bennett can only defend this back to the bowler
Low full toss on middle stump, he works this to deep midwicket
Another slower ball well outside off stump. Called a wide as Abhishek lets that go
Slower back of a length ball on off stump, Raza adjusts and with both feet off the ground bunts this to sweeper cover

Maposa after a tough start finally has something to smile about as Abhishek's innings ends. Another slower offcutter around off stump, Abhishek for once doesn't pick up the change of pace as he looks to smash this across the line. He gets it right off the toe-end of the bat to Raza at long-on, who makes no mistake. Raza had to run in from the boundary line and he did that well.
Slower ball gone wrong. Ends up being a knee-high full toss that is swatted away by Bennett to deep midwicket
On a length on off, he pushes to backward point with an open face of the bat
Flatter and shorter outside off, he flat-bats this to long-off. Burl gets away with one

Dube has not even managed to get anywhere close to it? That's just lazy from the allrounder. Length ball outside off, Raza crashes this to the left of Dube at long-off who makes no attempt to stop that. It wasn't too far away
Pushed quicker again well outside off stump, was the seam-up ball from Burl. Surya reaches for it and gets it to deep cover

And now some poor running from Raza. Marginally short on off stump, he pulls in the gap between deep midwicket and long-on. Raza feels that is going for four but deep midwicket moves swiftly to his left and intercepts
Slower through the air but waaaay outside off, called a wide
Fuller but well outside off stump, called a wide

Oh, that's a sensational effort from Raza and he effectively saves five runs for his team. Tossed up outside off stump, Hardik goes across the line but doesn't get all of it. The ball goes flat to Raza at wide long-on, who leaps to his right, completes the catch one-handed and chucks the ball back into the field of play. The only problem is that he doesn't get enough altitude as he throws the ball back in. That doesn't allow him to come back and complete the catch once he had overbalanced and gone out of the field of play
Fuller outside off, he digs this past cover
Banged in short on middle stump, he keeps that open stance again in place and pulls well to the left of deep square leg where Myers sprints, puts in a dive and saves two
Fortune favours the brave and Bennett has the fortune for the moment. Fuller outside off stump, he looks to go over extra cover, gets a thick outside edge that flies past the 'keeper

Redemption for Musekiwa as he takes a wonderful catch running in. Oh, there is some justice in this world, after all! Banged in short around off stump, rather just outside off, he backs away looking to cut this, but the ball gets big on him and he ends up slicing it straight up. Musekiwa sprints in from sweeper cover, dives and takes a good catch
Fuller well outside off, Bennett can't reach that. Called a wide
Short, wide and slapped away. Tilak gets on his toes and thumps this over backward point for four to get off the mark
Full outside off stump, Bennett walks across trying to dig that but he can't lay a bat on it
Fired on a length outside off, he taps this to backward point
Mistimed to deep backward square leg and the ball falls safely. Bouncer onto his body, the ball gets big on him as he mis-hits the pull. The ball falls in no-man's land well in front deep square leg
Raza not going down without a fight. Fuller outside off, he backs away, gives himself a little room and lofts to the left of long-off
Slower length ball just outside off, he flicks this to deep square leg. Some excellent running gets them two

Quick single and they make it. Flatter length ball outside off, he slaps it to Surya at extra cover and sets off. A good throw and a clean collection from Varun as he whips off the bails. But Raza was in
Fullish in length on off and middle, he muscles this to long-on albeit off the bottom of the bat

Huge appeal for lbw... not given. Arshdeep is confident. He's hardly appealed, just put his hands up. Will they go for the review? Yep, Surya does at the last moment. Fuller, angling into the pads of Burl. He looks to flick that and misses and is rapped on the pad. Was that sliding down leg? Oh, no it isn't. Ball tracker has that smashing into leg stump. Arshdeep has his hands up and looks at Surya. Burl departs for a two-ball duck.
Tilak is playing an absolute gem here. Fuller outside off, he backs away and with a free swing of the arm clobbers him inside-out over extra cover for a big six
Edged for four first ball. Angles this on off stump, with the ball holding its line after pitching. Munyonga gets a healthy outside edge that flies past the keeper's right
Full just around off stump, he gets across and attempts the cheeky scoop again. Only manages to inside-edge this back onto his pad
Two in two. Back of a length ball on his hips, he gets across and helps this to the right of deep backward square leg
Pinpoint yorker on middle stump, he digs this out and they pinch a single
On a length outside off, he mistimes this to long-on
Another solid yorker on middle, Munyonga jams this feebly to deep midwicket. They scamper back for the second and Bennett makes it with Tilak's flat throw just missing the non-striker's stumps

India's highest score in T20 World Cups and they still have two overs to go! Slower back of a length ball outside off stump, he picks up the change of pace nice and early and off the backfoot slams this over wide long-on
BIG heave and a miss! Fuller in length on off stump, he looks for a massive across the line swipe and is beaten
Fuller on leg stump, he flicks this with power to the left of deep midwicket for a couple of runs

Another appeal from Arsdheep, this time for caught behind. Nothing from Samson as he points to Surya. Does he go for the review? He does. This time, though, Bennett is nowhere near the ball. Full outside off, he goes for a drive and misses. Doesn't connect
Tilak is in overdrive! Slower delivery that just sticks into the surface outside off stump. Tilak sets a solid base, clears his front leg and slams him over long-on
Full outside off, he carves this to backward point and they don't get the single
INTO THE CROWD! Slower delivery that goes awfully wrong for Ngarava. Knee-high full toss on leg stump, he bends down on one knee and swats it across the line over deep midwicket
Angles the fuller length ball on middle stump, he gets a leading edge to long-on for a run
Nails the yorker finally and Tilak just about digs it out to the offside
